exploration_notes: I identified the core Kafka source files needed to implement InventoryConsumer: ConsumerConfig.java for configuration constants (BOOTSTRAP_SERVERS_CONFIG, GROUP_ID_CONFIG, KEY/VALUE_DESERIALIZER_CLASS_CONFIG, ENABLE_AUTO_COMMIT_CONFIG, AUTO_OFFSET_RESET_CONFIG), KafkaConsumer.java for the poll(Duration) and commitSync() APIs, WakeupException.java for clean shutdown handling, and the examples/Consumer.java as the canonical pattern reference showing how to wire these together.
